_comment: FakePlayerPlugin – Vercel config. Wiki is the primary UI; API endpoints are for the plugin only (Java HTTP clients). Browsers hitting /api/* are redirected to /wiki.
_comment_builds: Serverless functions need @vercel/node. Static files MUST be listed with @vercel/static – without an explicit build entry Vercel silently drops them from the output, causing 404s. Markdown files are fetched from GitHub raw at runtime (wiki-script.js WIKI_BASE_URL), so they are NOT included here.
_comment_routes: Route priority is top-down. API and static-asset routes must come before the wiki catch-all.

routes._comment: SPA – all /wiki/* hash routes handled client-side by wiki-script.js
Root – send bare-domain visitors straight to the wiki
Fallback – any unmatched path shows the wiki

_comment_headers: CORS for API (Java plugin cross-origin calls). Explicit Content-Type for CSS/JS prevents MIME-type errors in strict browsers.
